title: Bygone Effigy
move_pattern: Starts with Initial Sleep. Awakens with Wake (gains +10 Strength), then enters a loop of Slashes attacks.
notes: The Bygone Effigy begins dormant in a sleep state and awakens after the first turn. Upon awakening, it gains +10 Strength and then repeatedly attacks with Slashes, entering a dangerous phase where it continuously attacks until defeated.
